name: SEO & Google
author: CyberCheck
desc: Control how you show up on Google and in link previews — search title, description, share image, and the structured data that gets you into local search & maps. Any business, any industry.

setup.label: Search title (aim for 55–60 characters)
setup.ph: Sparkle Clean — House & Office Cleaning in Mobile, AL

setup.label: Search description (~155 characters)
setup.ph: Trusted, insured house & office cleaning across Mobile & Baldwin County. Book online in 60 seconds.

setup.label: Keywords (comma-separated)
setup.ph: house cleaning, maid service, office cleaning, Mobile AL

setup.label: Areas you serve
setup.ph: Mobile, Baldwin County, Gulf Shores, Daphne
